findings.title: Python versions do not match
findings.recommendation: Choose one serving Python version and align conda.yaml, Dockerfile, MLmodel, and pyproject.toml.

findings.title: Unpinned dependencies reduce reproducibility
findings.message: Unpinned packages detected: mlflow, pandas, numpy.
findings.recommendation: Pin production serving dependencies to exact versions for reproducible financial AI deployment.

findings.title: MLFLOW_TRACKING_URI is not declared
findings.message: The MLflow tracking endpoint is not visible in env/config files.
findings.recommendation: Add MLFLOW_TRACKING_URI to .env.example and deployment secret documentation.

findings.title: Model URI points to a local file path
findings.message: Local file model_uri values usually fail after containerization or KServe deployment.
findings.recommendation: Use models:/, runs:/, s3://, gs://, or a platform artifact URI reachable from the serving cluster.

findings.title: Windows path separator detected
findings.message: Backslash paths can break in Linux containers and Kubernetes pods.
findings.recommendation: Use POSIX-style paths or URI schemes for cross-platform deployment.

findings.title: Referenced artifact path does not exist
findings.message: MLmodel references 'missing-model.pkl', but the path was not found.
findings.recommendation: Verify artifact packaging before deployment and ensure the model directory contains referenced files.

findings.title: Dockerfile has no WORKDIR
findings.message: A missing WORKDIR often causes relative artifact and app paths to resolve differently.
findings.recommendation: Add WORKDIR /app and copy model/application files relative to it.

findings.title: KServe storageUri uses a local path
findings.message: Local paths are not portable across Kubernetes nodes.
findings.recommendation: Use object storage or PVC-backed paths approved for the serving cluster.
